script:
#!/bin/bash
set -uo pipefail

echo '=== VPS SYSTEM AUDIT PART 2 ==='
echo "Date: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC')"
echo ""

# 6. SSL
echo '=== 6. SSL ==='
if [ -d /etc/letsencrypt/live ]; then
  ls /etc/letsencrypt/live/ 2>/dev/null
  for d in /etc/letsencrypt/live/*/; do
    domain=$(basename "$d")
    [ "$domain" = 'README' ] && continue
    expiry=$(openssl x509 -enddate -noout -in "${d}fullchain.pem" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
    echo "  $domain: expires $expiry"
  done
else
  echo 'No LE certs'
fi
echo ""

# 7. Security updates
echo '=== 7. UPDATES ==='
apt list --upgradable 2>/dev/null | grep -ci security || echo '0 security updates'
echo ""

# 8. Fail2ban
echo '=== 8. FAIL2BAN ==='
fail2ban-client status sshd 2>/dev/null || echo 'fail2ban not active for sshd'
echo ""

# 9. Cron
echo '=== 9. CRON ==='
crontab -l 2>/dev/null || echo 'no cron for current user'
echo ""

# 10. Git repos
echo '=== 10. GIT REPOS ==='
find /root /home /opt -maxdepth 4 -name '.git' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -20 | while read g; do
  dir=$(dirname "$g")
  branch=$(cd "$dir" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)
  echo "  $dir [$branch]"
done
echo ""

# 11. Env files
echo '=== 11. ENV FILES ==='
find /root /home /opt -maxdepth 4 -name '.env' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo ""

# 12. Disk usage top dirs
echo '=== 12. DISK USAGE ==='
du -sh /root /home /opt /var/log /var/lib/docker 2>/dev/null | sort -rh
echo ""

# 13. Last logins
echo '=== 13. LAST LOGINS ==='
last -n 10 2>/dev/null | head -12
echo ""

# 14. Running processes (top CPU)
echo '=== 14. TOP PROCESSES ==='
ps aux --sort=-%cpu 2>/dev/null | head -15
echo ""

# 15. Docker networks
echo '=== 15. DOCKER NETWORKS ==='
docker network ls 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# 16. Nginx status
echo '=== 16. NGINX ==='
nginx -t 2>&1 || echo 'nginx not available'
nginx -T 2>/dev/null | grep server_name | head -10 || true
echo ""

echo '=== AUDIT PART 2 COMPLETE ==='
intent: VPS system audit part 2 — SSL, fail2ban, cron, logins, disk
